title: [codereview-P0] Incorrect expected_channel in hash_based_peer_rendezvous vector
description: Computed hash_32(12345, 0xaabbccddeeff0011) %7 +1 =7 but vector has 4. Violates test integrity and independent oracle. Must fix to match external oracle. da2q rendezvous must be bit-exact.
close_reason: expected_channel fixed to 7 per hash_32 computation and external oracle
